name: LAS VEGAS SANDS CORP
summary: Las Vegas Sands Corp. (LVS) is a Fortune 500 company and leading global developer and operator of Integrated Resorts featuring premium accommodations, casino gaming, retail malls, convention and exhibition (MICE) facilities, celebrity chef restaurants, and entertainment. It owns and operates properties in Macao (through 74.80% ownership of Sands China Ltd.) including The Venetian Macao, The Londoner Macao, The Parisian Macao, Four Seasons Macao, and Sands Macao, as well as Marina Bay Sands in Singapore.

products.name: The Venetian Macao Resort Hotel
products.description: Themed Integrated Resort in Macao featuring gaming, hotels, MICE, retail, and dining.

products.name: The Londoner Macao
products.description: Europe-themed Integrated Resort on the Cotai Strip with replicas of Houses of Parliament and Elizabeth Tower.

products.name: The Parisian Macao
products.description: Themed Integrated Resort featuring an iconic replica of the Eiffel Tower and related attractions.

products.name: The Plaza Macao and Four Seasons Hotel Macao
products.description: Integrated Resort in Macao featuring Four Seasons branded hotel accommodations and gaming.

products.name: Sands Macao
products.description: Integrated Resort in Macao offering gaming and hospitality amenities.

products.name: Marina Bay Sands
products.description: Iconic Integrated Resort in Singapore serving as a major tourist, business, and retail destination.

products.name: Sands ECO360
products.description: Global sustainability program focused on energy efficiency, waste reduction, water conservation, and responsible sourcing.

products.name: Sands Cares
products.description: Charitable giving and community engagement program driving social impact initiatives.

products.name: Paiza
products.description: Exclusive VIP brand associated with luxury amenities, private gaming salons, and invitation-only clubs across LVS properties.

partnerships.description: Hotel brand partnership for The Plaza Macao and Four Seasons Hotel Macao property.
